figures.title: Phase 1 to Phase 5 evidence chain for the manuscript path
figures.purpose: Show how the selected manuscript path moves from lane anchor to causal bridge to progression burden to translational packet to endotype context.
figures.allowed_conclusion: This figure supports the structure of the evidence chain, not a claim of clinical proof.

figures.title: Biomarker and readout panel for the lead translational packet
figures.purpose: Show the candidate biomarker panel, expected readouts, time windows, and sample types.
figures.allowed_conclusion: This figure supports the proposed readout spine and experimental logic, not treatment efficacy.

figures.title: Downstream burden and endotype context
figures.purpose: Show the progression objects (Microglial Chronic Activation, Neurovascular Uncoupling) and the linked endotypes (Acute Mild Biomarker / Imaging Bridge, Acute Severe Vascular-Dominant, Acute Blast Vascular / Inflammatory Mixed, Subacute Repetitive Inflammatory-Dominant).
figures.allowed_conclusion: This figure supports context and stratification framing only.

figures.title: Evidence boundaries and contradiction map
figures.purpose: Show the main contradictions, evidence gaps, and source-quality boundaries that still limit the paper.
figures.allowed_conclusion: This figure is explicitly a limitation and boundedness figure.
